text: Aaj subah is backup startup se termination mail aate hi mere seene mein ek bhayankar jakdan mehsus ho rahi hai jaise koi mera dam ghont raha ho. UPSC mein pehle hi teen saal barbaad ho chuke hain aur ab is layoff ke baad mere dimaag ki nasein fatne ko ho rahi hain. Mere hath-pair thande pad gaye hain aur gala itna sookh gaya hai ki paani ka ghoont bhi gale se neeche nahi utar raha.

MNC se nikalne ki khabar milte hi mere pure badan mein ek ajeeb si thakan aur kapkapi shuru ho gayi hai jo rukne ka naam nahi le rahi. Ghar par sab ko lagta hai ki main sarkari naukri ki taiyari kar rahi hoon, par is nakami ke baad mere pet mein aisi marod uthi hai ki main bistar se uth bhi nahi pa rahi. Sar mein itna bhari dard hai ki lagta hai mera dimaag abhi sunn ho jayega.

PSC ke dropper hone ke darr se ye private job pakdi thi, par aaj termination email dekh kar mere kandhon aur peeth mein aisi aithan ho gayi hai ki hilna bhi bojh lag raha hai. Papa ne kisan hokar apni sari jama-pungi meri coaching mein laga di thi, aur ab ye khabar sunkar mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena cheer kar bahar aa jayegi. Mujhe lagatar chakkar aa rahe hain aur aakhon ke aage bas andhera hai.

Termination mail padhte hi mere gale mein ek ajeeb si jalan aur ghutan ho rahi hai, bilkul waisi hi jaisi UPSC prelims fail hone par hui thi. Kirana shop chalane wale Papa ki EMI ka bojh ab kaise uthega, ye soch kar mere ghutne dard se kaanp rahe hain. Pure jism mein ek aisi jalan phail rahi hai ki mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ye bukhar hai ya meri kismat ka dhoka.

Subah se jabse layoff ka pata chala hai, mere dimaag mein ek zor ki seeti baj rahi hai aur mera chehra bilkul sunn pad gaya hai. Coaching institute ki fees aur family investment ka karz utaarne ka ye aakhri rasta tha, par ab mere hath-pair bilkul kaam nahi kar rahe. Mere seene mein aisi chhubhan hai jaise koi suiyaan ghomp raha ho, aur mujhe saans lene mein bahut takleef ho rahi hai.
